name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Bears app workflow plugin for sequential DIRECT routing, waves, functional graphs, task ledgers, repo-scoped queues, immutable review, and remediation.

interface.shortDescription: DIRECT routing and bounded repo app waves.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides sequential DIRECT stage routing, app constitutions, research waves, functional specifications, graph-linked plans, persistent repo queues, one-task app-worker dispatch, immutable repo-wave review, remediation planning, instruction policy editing, role profile architecture, primary-source evidence research, and convergence analysis.
defaultPrompt: Resume app workflow stages with one DIRECT primary.
Execute repo-scoped ledger queues with bounded workers and immutable review.
